arts.ttl: Liverpool captain Van Dijk admits Chelsea ‘deserved’ win
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has said Chelsea ‘deserved’ the win after beating the champions 3-1 at Stamford Bridge. Liverpool lost just the third time in the Premier League this season with the Reds second-best in the capital. Chelsea applauded Liverpool onto the pitch with a traditional guard of honour but the goodwill did not […] The post Liverpool captain Van Dijk admits Chelsea ‘deserved’ win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea beat lacklustre Liverpool to boost Champions League hopes
arts.sum: Victory pulls Chelsea level on points with fourth-placed Newcastle.
